items.value_source: GitHub secrets vs vars cannot be reliably distinguished from process.env at runtime
items.exact_fix_instruction: Create a smaller verified vessel reference CSV for enrichment.
items.fix_hint: Create a smaller verified vessel reference CSV for enrichment.
items.business_impact: Verified source CSV enrichment cache may not refresh; existing cache is used if available.

items.business_impact: Vessel particulars such as IMO, MMSI, GT, DWT, flag, and vessel type may remain incomplete.

items.exact_fix_instruction: Set PILOT_SOURCE_URLS to one or more allowed pilot schedule URLs.
items.fix_hint: Set PILOT_SOURCE_URLS to one or more allowed pilot schedule URLs.
items.business_impact: Pilotage timing and berth-arrival confirmation signals are unavailable.

items.value_source: GitHub secrets vs vars cannot be reliably distinguished from process.env at runtime
items.exact_fix_instruction: Set BERTH_SOURCE_URLS or PNC_SOURCE_URLS. Current collector directly uses PNC_SOURCE_URLS for berth-like feeds.
items.fix_hint: Set BERTH_SOURCE_URLS or PNC_SOURCE_URLS. Current collector directly uses PNC_SOURCE_URLS for berth-like feeds.
items.business_impact: Berth assignment and terminal schedule enrichment may be unavailable.

items.exact_fix_instruction: Set PORT_OPERATION_SERVICE_KEY or an accepted fallback key. PORT_OPERATION_API_URL can use the default endpoint.
